lines.text: So we test it. Like the patrol tests coins. (beat) If you can hear me… move one leaf.
One leaf for yes. Nothing for no. Deal?
He's building a protocol. This creature the patrol calls vermin has independently derived a one-bit communication protocol. I've onboarded senior engineers with less.
Are you a spirit? (nothing) A demon? (nothing) A god? (nothing — then, reluctantly, half a tilt)
Were you the fruit? (yes) Did it hurt? (nothing) Did you MEAN to hit my head? (a very long pause — then yes)
